defaultView.name: Default View
defaultView.description: The view displayed when the plugin opens

debugMode.name: Developer Mode
debugMode.description: Enable detailed debug logs. When disabled, only statistics and errors are shown

showNavButtonText.name: Show Navigation Button Text
showNavButtonText.description: Show text labels on view navigation buttons in the toolbar. When disabled, only icons are shown

timezone.name: Timezone
timezone.description: Select the timezone used by calendar views. Affects 'today' determination and calendar highlighting

timeFormat.name: Time Format
timeFormat.description: Task time display format, affects time presentation in modals and views

useObsidianDailyNote.name: Use Obsidian Daily Note Settings
useObsidianDailyNote.description: Read folder and format settings from the core 'Daily Notes' plugin or 'Periodic Notes' plugin

notDetected.name: Daily Note Plugin Not Detected
notDetected.description: Please enable the core 'Daily Notes' plugin or install the 'Periodic Notes' community plugin

folder.name: Daily Note Folder Path
folder.description: Specify the folder path for Daily Note files (relative to vault root)

format.name: Daily Note File Name Format
format.description: Specify the Daily Note file name format (e.g., yyyy-MM-dd, auto-replaced with current date in day view)

template.name: Daily Note Template Path
template.description: Template file path used when creating Daily Notes (leave empty to create blank files)

dateFilterField.name: Date Filter Field
dateFilterField.description: Calendar views always use this field to filter tasks; Task view can switch flexibly in the toolbar

weekStart.name: Week Start Day
weekStart.description: Select the first day of the week

showLunar.name: Show Lunar Calendar
showLunar.description: Display lunar date text in year, month, and week views

showFestivals.name: Show Festivals & Solar Terms
showFestivals.description: Display highlighted colors for festivals and solar terms on lunar text

globalFilter.name: Global Task Filter
globalFilter.description: Prefix symbol or text used to mark tasks (e.g., '🎯 ', 'TODO ', '#task '). ⚠ Requires Obsidian restart after modification

taskFormat.name: Enabled Task Formats
taskFormat.description: Select the task format to support (Tasks plugin or Dataview plugin)

options.dataview: Dataview Plugin Format (inline fields for dates)

showGlobalFilter.name: Show Global Filter in Task Text
showGlobalFilter.description: Display the global filter prefix in task list text. When disabled, only the task description is shown

taskNotePath.name: Task Note Folder Path
taskNotePath.description: Default folder path for notes created from tasks (relative to vault root)

newTaskHeading.name: New Task Heading
newTaskHeading.description: Target heading when adding new tasks in Daily Notes (leave empty to append to file end)

defaultPriority.name: Default Task Priority
defaultPriority.description: Default priority when creating new tasks

recurringLimit.name: Recurring Task Instance Display Limit
recurringLimit.description: Maximum number of future virtual instances displayed per recurring task in week/month views. Set to 0 to hide virtual instances.

defaultStatus.name: Default Status
defaultStatus.description: Todo and Done are core statuses and cannot be deleted

customStatus.name: Custom Status
customStatus.description: Modify colors or delete freely. Click ✎ to edit

showDailyNote.name: Show Daily Note
showDailyNote.description: Display Daily Note content in the day view

layout.name: Day View Layout
layout.description: Choose the layout for Daily Note and task list

taskLimit.name: Tasks Per Day
taskLimit.description: Set the maximum number of tasks displayed per date card in month view (1-10)

lunarFontSize.name: Month Lunar Font Size
lunarFontSize.description: Set the size of lunar calendar text in month view (8-18px)

showTaskCount.name: Show Daily Task Count
showTaskCount.description: Display total task count (completed + incomplete) below each date in year view

lunarFontSize.name: Lunar Font Size
lunarFontSize.description: Adjust lunar text size in year view month cards (8-18px)

heatmapEnabled.name: Enable Task Heatmap
heatmapEnabled.description: Display date background color intensity based on daily task count

heatmapPalette.name: Heatmap Color Scheme
heatmapPalette.description: Select the color gradient for the task heatmap

heatmap3D.name: Heatmap 3D Effect
heatmap3D.description: Add glass bead texture effect to heatmap color cells

startField.name: Gantt Start Field
startField.description: Select the task time field used to determine the gantt bar start position

endField.name: Gantt End Field
endField.description: Select the task time field used to determine the gantt bar end position

taskList.name: Task List
taskList.description: Fetch available task lists from Feishu account

targetFile.name: Feishu Sync Target File
targetFile.description: New Feishu tasks will be synced to this file (auto-created if not exists)

direction.name: Sync Direction
direction.description: Choose the direction of task synchronization

conflictResolution.name: Conflict Resolution
conflictResolution.description: How to handle conflicts when both local and Feishu tasks are modified simultaneously

autoSyncInterval.name: Auto Sync Interval
autoSyncInterval.description: Time interval (minutes) between automatic syncs. Set to 0 to disable auto sync

manualSync.name: Manual Sync
manualSync.description: Perform a sync operation immediately. 'Test Sync' only syncs the 5 most recent tasks for debugging.

syncNow.confirmMessage:
About to perform a full bidirectional sync:

• Obsidian → Feishu: Push all unsynchronized local tasks
• Feishu → Obsidian: Pull all unsynchronized remote tasks
• Synced tasks will be updated based on changes
• Conflicting tasks will be handled according to the current conflict strategy

Please ensure sync parameters are properly configured.

testSync.tooltip: Bidirectionally sync the 5 most recent tasks for debugging
testSync.confirmMessage:
About to perform test sync (limited to 5 tasks):

• Only syncs the 5 most recent tasks
• Bidirectional: Obsidian ↔ Feishu
• Will not affect already synced tasks

Proceed?

disclaimer.title: Sync feature is under active development
disclaimer.warning: This feature may have unknown stability issues. Please back up your vault before use to avoid data loss.
disclaimer.backupReminder: Data is priceless. Back up first.

statusHint.fetchFirst: ↑ Please click 'Fetch Task Lists' above to get the list, then select a sync target.
statusHint.notSelected: ⚠ No task list selected. Sync cannot proceed. Please select a task list below as the sync target.
statusHint.selected: ✓ Task list selected, sync is ready. Target list: 「

taskListCards.creator: Creator: {{id}}
taskListCards.testWriteTitle: Write 5 test tasks to this list to verify API connectivity
taskListCards.clearTasksTitle: Delete all Feishu tasks in this list (irreversible)

switchConfirm.title: Switch Task List
switchConfirm.message:
⚠️ Switching task lists will trigger a full sync

For ease of management, tasks in Obsidian will only sync to the currently selected target list
and will not be mixed with tasks from other Feishu lists.

Confirm switching to list 「{{name}}」?

clearConfirm.title: Clear Tasks
clearConfirm.message:
Are you sure you want to clear all tasks in list 「{{name}}」?

This will delete all Feishu tasks in this list and cannot be undone!

taskListCards.switchConfirmMessage: Switching will trigger full sync. Confirm switch to {{name}}?
taskListCards.clearConfirmMessage: Delete all tasks in {{name}}? This cannot be undone!

appId.label: App ID
appId.description: App ID from Feishu Open Platform

appSecret.label: App Secret
appSecret.description: App Secret from Feishu Open Platform, used to refresh tokens

authCode.label: Authorization Code
authCode.description: Copy the code parameter from the browser callback URL and paste here, then click to get token

oauth.invalidCode: Please enter a valid authorization code
oauth.invalidCodeNotice: Please enter a valid authorization code
oauth.testConnectionTooltip: Test connection and get user info
oauth.completeAuthInBrowser: Complete Feishu authorization in browser, then copy the code from the callback URL and paste here
oauth.pleaseConfigureAppIdAndSecret: Please configure Feishu App ID and App Secret first
oauth.apiMissingAccessToken: Feishu API response error: missing access_token

enabled.name: Enable Push Filter
enabled.description: When enabled, only tasks matching filter conditions will be pushed to Feishu. Changes to already synced tasks will still be synced.

completionStatus.name: Completion Status Filter
completionStatus.description: Select which tasks to push. Already synced tasks are unaffected.

dateFilter.name: Date Filter
dateFilter.description: Only push tasks with dates after the specified date. A task matches if any date field matches.

pathFilter.name: Path Filter
pathFilter.description: Filter by file path, one path per line. Folders end with /
pathFilter.placeholder:
One path per line, e.g.:
projects/
Daily/Tasks.md

notices.cancelled: Task list selection cancelled, sync paused.
notices.browserAuth: Please complete Feishu authorization in your browser, then copy the authorization code from the callback URL
notices.needAppCredentials: Please configure Feishu App ID and App Secret first
notices.feishuApiError: Feishu API response format error: missing access_token
notices.codeExpired: Authorization code expired. Please re-authorize (code is valid for ~5 minutes)
notices.noRefreshToken: No refresh token available. Please re-authorize
notices.notAuthorized: Not authorized: please complete Feishu authorization first
notices.tokenExpiryHint: Possible cause: Access Token invalid or expired
notices.reAuthSuggestion: Suggestion: Please re-authorize to get a new token
notices.permissionIssue: Possible cause: Insufficient permissions or app not approved
notices.permissionSuggestion: Suggestion: Check app permission configuration and review status
notices.networkSuggestion: Suggestion: Check network connection or firewall settings
notices.pleaseAuth: Please complete Feishu authorization in settings first
notices.selectTaskList: Please select a Feishu task list as sync target
notices.noTaskLists: No task lists found. Please create at least one task list in Feishu and try again.
notices.authExpired: Authentication failed: Access Token is invalid or expired. Please re-authorize.
notices.networkError: Network error: Please check your network connection.
notices.testWriteConfirmMessage:
About to create 5 test tasks in list 「{{name}}」 to verify sync functionality.

Proceed?
notices.virtualTaskDesc: Connectivity test task created by Gantt Calendar plugin. Safe to delete.

notices.configRequired: Please configure Feishu App ID and App Secret first

connectionTest.possible401: Possible cause: Access token invalid or expired
